message:
You know those moments when you feel a little too smug about being prepared? I had one last week. My family and I were packing for a weekend getaway, and I insisted on bringing our go-bags. My partner rolled their eyes, saying, "We won't need those! It’s just a quick trip!" Fast forward to the first night when a surprise storm rolled in, knocking out the power. 

I calmly pulled out our flashlights, snacks, and even some extra blankets from the go-bags. My partner raised an eyebrow and said, "Okay, okay, you were right!" 

It was a small but satisfying moment, reminding us both that being prepared doesn’t just mean having supplies; it also means peace of mind. 

If you haven’t thought about your own go-bags lately, this little refresher helped me get my act together! How do you stay ready for the unexpected in your own home?
